companies.name: DN Construction
companies.description: Our flagship company that has undertaken mega projects across Turkey and the world with half a century of experience.

companies.name: DN Energy
companies.description: Investing in renewable energy sources for a sustainable future and meeting Turkey's energy needs.

companies.name: DN Mining
companies.description: Bringing our natural resources to the economy with environmentally friendly modern mining technologies.

companies.name: DN Food
companies.description: Contributing to public health with reliable, healthy, and innovative food products from farm to table.

companies.name: DN Technology
companies.description: Pioneering the digital transformation of our group companies and developing software solutions for global markets.

companies.name: DN Real Estate
companies.description: Developing premium residential and commercial real estate projects that change city skylines and add value to life.

projects.title: DN Tower Istanbul
projects.description: LEED Gold certified 45-story smart office tower project located in Istanbul's new financial center.

projects.title: Aegean Wind Power Plant
projects.description: 120MW capacity wind power plant established in the Izmir region, meeting the electricity needs of 150,000 households annually.

projects.title: Eurasia Logistics Center
projects.description: A giant 250,000 square meter logistics base connecting continents, equipped with state-of-the-art automation systems.

projects.title: Organic Farming Valley
projects.description: Turkey's largest integrated organic farming facility supported by smart agricultural practices and sustainable water management.

projects.title: Smart City Platform
projects.description: An AI-supported platform developed for metropolitan municipalities that optimizes traffic, energy, and waste management from a single center.

projects.title: Anatolia Marble Processing Complex
projects.description: Europe's most modern marble processing facility, working with a zero-waste principle and equipped with state-of-the-art CNC machines.

news.title: DN Holding Publishes 2024 Sustainability Report
news.excerpt: We successfully reduced our carbon footprint by 15% last year.

news.title: Central Anatolia's Largest Solar Power Plant Being Built
news.excerpt: DN Energy has signed the agreements for the new solar power plant to be established in Konya.

news.title: International Smart Cities Award to DN Technology
news.excerpt: Our Smart City Platform was deemed worthy of an award at the technology summit in London.
